description: HTTP listen port (default: 5000). Railway sets this automatically.
Public URL of your instance (e.g., https://your-app.up.railway.app). Appears in notification alerts.
Log level: TRACE, DEBUG, INFO, SUCCESS, WARNING, ERROR, CRITICAL.
Number of parallel fetch workers for monitoring checks (default: 10).
Timezone for scheduled checking (e.g., America/New_York, Europe/London).
Set to true to disable telemetry and version check.
